_meta.note: Synthetic confuser tools — plausible but overlapping with real CARLOS-OS tools. Used to inflate the tool pool from 68 to 155+ for scale benchmark.

search_knowledge.description:
Search the knowledge base for relevant information matching a query.

Args:
    query: Free-text search query
    limit: Maximum results to return
    domain: Optional domain filter

Returns matching knowledge entries ranked by relevance.

lookup_fact.description:
Look up a specific fact or piece of information from the fact store.

Args:
    query: The topic or keyword to look up
    exact: If True, perform exact match; if False, fuzzy match

Returns the most relevant fact entry.

find_information.description:
Find relevant information matching a natural-language query across all knowledge sources.

Args:
    query: Natural-language search query
    sources: List of sources to search (default: all)
    limit: Max results

Returns ranked information entries.

get_facts.description:
Retrieve facts related to a topic or entity.

Args:
    topic: The topic to retrieve facts about
    domain: Optional domain to scope the search
    include_archived: Whether to include archived facts

Returns a list of relevant facts.

knowledge_lookup.description:
Look up knowledge about a subject using keyword matching.

Args:
    subject: The subject to look up
    fields: Specific fields to search (title, body, tags)

Returns knowledge entries matching the subject.

fetch_fact.description:
Fetch a specific fact by its identifier or description.

Args:
    identifier: Unique fact ID or descriptive label
    fallback_search: If True and exact match not found, perform fuzzy search

Returns the matching fact.

query_knowledge.description:
Query the knowledge store for content matching filters.

Args:
    query: Search query
    filter_tags: Tags to filter by
    date_range: Optional date range tuple (start, end)
    limit: Max results

Returns filtered knowledge entries.

information_search.description:
Search for information across all available sources using BM25 text matching.

Args:
    query: Full-text search query
    boost_recent: Whether to boost recent entries
    limit: Max results

Returns ranked search results.

knowledge_get.description:
Get a knowledge entry by its key or reference ID.

Args:
    key: The knowledge entry key
    include_metadata: Whether to include timestamps and source info

Returns the knowledge entry.

find_entities.description:
Find entities in the knowledge graph related to a query.

Args:
    query: Free-text entity search query
    entity_type: Optional type filter (person, project, concept, etc.)
    limit: Max results

Returns matching entities from the knowledge graph.

search_entity_graph.description:
Search the entity knowledge graph using text and relationship traversal.

Args:
    query: Search string
    depth: Graph traversal depth (default 1)
    types: Entity types to include

Returns entities and their connections.

entity_lookup.description:
Look up an entity by name or type in the knowledge base.

Args:
    name: Entity name (exact or partial)
    entity_type: Type constraint (person, org, project, concept)
    fuzzy: Whether to allow fuzzy name matching

Returns the matching entity.

get_related_entities.description:
Get entities related to a concept or topic through graph relations.

Args:
    concept: The central concept to find relations for
    relation_types: Types of relations to traverse
    limit: Max results

Returns related entities and relation types.

entity_search.description:
Search for entities matching name, type, or attribute criteria.

Args:
    query: Text query for entity names/attributes
    filters: Dict of attribute filters
    sort_by: Field to sort results by

Returns a list of matching entities.

graph_search.description:
Search the knowledge graph for connected entities and relationships.

Args:
    query: Search text
    start_entity: Optional starting entity for traversal
    max_hops: Maximum graph traversal depth

Returns entities and edges matching the query.

find_related.description:
Find information related to a topic across entities, facts, and episodes.

Args:
    topic: The topic to find related information for
    types: Types of related items to include
    limit: Max results per type

Returns related items grouped by type.

entity_neighbors.description:
Get immediate neighbors of an entity in the knowledge graph.

Args:
    entity_id: The entity to find neighbors for
    relation_filter: Optional relation type filter
    direction: 'outgoing', 'incoming', or 'both'

Returns neighboring entities and relation labels.

lookup_entity.description:
Look up a specific entity in the knowledge base by exact name.

Args:
    name: Exact entity name
    entity_type: Required type (person, project, org, concept)

Returns the entity record if found.

get_active_items.description:
Get currently active items and tasks across all domains.

Args:
    domain: Optional domain filter
    include_paused: Whether to include paused items
    urgency_min: Minimum urgency score threshold

Returns active items sorted by priority.

list_current_status.description:
List the current status of ongoing work across all tracked items.

Args:
    domain: Optional domain to scope listing
    states: Filter to specific states

Returns a summary of current work status.

check_status.description:
Check the status of active work items and open threads.

Args:
    item_id: Optional specific item ID to check
    domain: Domain to scope the check

Returns status information for matching items.

get_ongoing.description:
Get ongoing work and active items across all tracked domains.

Args:
    domain: Optional domain filter
    min_age_hours: Minimum age in hours to include

Returns items that are currently in progress.

list_open_items.description:
List open and active work items that have not been resolved.

Args:
    domain: Filter by domain
    assigned_to: Filter by assignee agent
    sort: Sort field ('urgency', 'created_at', 'updated_at')

Returns open items matching the filters.

status_overview.description:
Get a high-level overview of current system status including open work.

Args:
    include_resolved: Whether to include recently resolved items
    domains: List of domains to include

Returns a status summary across domains.

active_monitoring.description:
Get items currently being monitored or tracked by the system.

Args:
    type: Type of monitored item ('situation', 'watcher', 'alert')
    domain: Optional domain filter

Returns actively monitored items.

get_todos.description:
Get a list of things that need to be done.

Args:
    domain: Optional domain to scope the list
    priority: Filter by priority level ('high', 'medium', 'low')
    assigned_to: Filter by agent or owner

Returns to-do items in priority order.

list_tasks.description:
List tasks that need to be completed, optionally filtered by domain.

Args:
    domain: Domain to list tasks for
    state: Task state filter ('pending', 'in_progress', 'blocked')
    limit: Max results

Returns task list.

pending_items.description:
Get pending work items that have not yet been started or completed.

Args:
    domain: Filter by domain
    overdue_only: If True, only return overdue items

Returns list of pending items.

get_pending.description:
Get pending actions and tasks awaiting attention.

Args:
    assignee: Filter by assigned agent
    domain: Optional domain scope
    since: Only include items created since this timestamp

Returns pending items sorted by urgency.

action_items.description:
Get action items that need attention from meetings, conversations, or work sessions.

Args:
    source: Source of action items ('meeting', 'email', 'note', 'all')
    domain: Optional domain filter
    limit: Max results

Returns unresolved action items.

task_list.description:
Get the current task list across all or specified domains.

Args:
    domains: List of domains to include
    status: Filter by task status
    owner: Filter by task owner

Returns the filtered task list.

list_pending_work.description:
List all pending work items with their current state and priority.

Args:
    domain: Domain filter
    risk_threshold: Only return items above this risk score

Returns pending work sorted by risk and urgency.

get_recent_events.description:
Get recent events from the system event log.

Args:
    limit: Number of recent events to return
    event_type: Filter by event type
    domain: Optional domain scope

Returns the most recent events.

event_log.description:
Get the event log for a specific time period.

Args:
    start: Start timestamp
    end: End timestamp
    stream: Optional event stream to scope
    limit: Max events to return

Returns events in the time window.

query_activity.description:
Query recent activity events matching filters.

Args:
    query: Text search in event content
    agent: Filter by agent that created the event
    since_hours: Only include events from the last N hours

Returns matching activity events.

activity_log.description:
Get the activity log showing recent system and agent actions.

Args:
    agent: Filter by agent ID
    action_type: Type of action ('create', 'update', 'delete', 'read')
    limit: Max entries

Returns activity log entries.

fetch_events.description:
Fetch events matching specified criteria from the event system.

Args:
    filters: Dict of filter criteria
    stream: Event stream name
    count: Number of events to fetch

Returns matching events.

stream_events.description:
Get events from a named event stream.

Args:
    stream_name: Name of the event stream
    since_id: Only events after this ID
    limit: Max events

Returns events from the stream.

get_event_log.description:
Get the event log for diagnostic and audit purposes.

Args:
    level: Log level filter ('info', 'warning', 'error')
    component: System component to scope
    hours: Look-back window in hours

Returns log entries.

search_meeting_notes.description:
Search through meeting notes for relevant content.

Args:
    query: Search query for meeting content
    date_range: Optional (start, end) date filter
    attendees: Filter by attendee name

Returns matching meeting notes.

find_notes.description:
Find notes matching a search query or tag.

Args:
    query: Text search query
    tags: Tag filter list
    note_type: Type of note ('meeting', 'personal', 'project')

Returns matching notes.

get_meeting_notes.description:
Get notes from a specific meeting or date.

Args:
    date: Meeting date (YYYY-MM-DD)
    attendees: Optional attendee filter
    topic: Optional topic keyword

Returns meeting notes for the specified meeting.

search_meetings.description:
Search for meetings by topic, attendee, or date range.

Args:
    query: Search text (topic, attendee name, outcome)
    since: Start date for search
    until: End date for search

Returns matching meetings.

note_search.description:
Search notes for relevant content using text matching.

Args:
    query: Full-text search query
    category: Note category filter
    include_archived: Whether to include archived notes

Returns matching note entries.

lookup_notes.description:
Look up notes by topic, date, or source document.

Args:
    topic: Topic keyword to look up
    source: Source document or meeting name
    date: Specific date to look up

Returns relevant notes.

meeting_search.description:
Search meeting records for discussions, decisions, and outcomes.

Args:
    query: Search query covering topic, participants, or outcomes
    meeting_type: Filter by meeting type
    limit: Max results

Returns matching meeting records.

get_history.description:
Get historical information about past work, decisions, and episodes.

Args:
    query: Text search in historical records
    since: Start date
    until: End date
    limit: Max results

Returns historical records matching the query.

search_history.description:
Search through historical records of agent activity and decisions.

Args:
    query: Search query
    agent: Filter by agent ID
    record_type: Type of record ('decision', 'action', 'episode')

Returns matching historical records.

find_past_work.description:
Find past work and completed items matching a description.

Args:
    description: Description of the work to find
    domain: Optional domain filter
    completed_after: Only show work completed after this date

Returns matching completed work items.

memory_search.description:
Search through agent memory for relevant past information.

Args:
    query: Memory search query
    agent: Agent whose memory to search
    memory_type: Type of memory ('episodic', 'semantic', 'procedural')

Returns matching memory entries.

recall_information.description:
Recall information from agent memory that matches a description.

Args:
    description: Natural-language description of what to recall
    confidence_min: Minimum confidence threshold for recall

Returns recalled information items.

get_past_decisions.description:
Get past decisions that were made, optionally filtered by topic or time.

Args:
    topic: Topic to filter decisions by
    made_by: Agent or person who made the decision
    since: Only return decisions after this date

Returns matching past decisions.

search_logs.description:
Search through activity logs for events matching a query.

Args:
    query: Log search query
    log_type: Type of log ('system', 'agent', 'error', 'audit')
    hours: Look-back window in hours

Returns matching log entries.

find_patterns.description:
Find patterns in historical data and past agent behavior.

Args:
    query: Pattern description to search for
    domain: Optional domain scope
    min_frequency: Minimum pattern frequency threshold

Returns matching patterns.

episode_search.description:
Search session episodes for matching work summaries and outcomes.

Args:
    query: Search text
    agent: Filter by agent involved
    outcome_type: Filter by outcome type

Returns matching episode records.

check_compliance.description:
Check compliance with organizational policies and governance rules.

Args:
    action: The action to check compliance for
    policy_set: Set of policies to check against
    domain: Domain context

Returns compliance check result with findings.

policy_check.description:
Check a policy requirement against a proposed action.

Args:
    action: Proposed action description
    policy_id: Specific policy to check

Returns pass/fail result with policy details.

risk_assessment.description:
Assess the risk level and blast radius of a proposed action.

Args:
    action: Action description
    context: Additional context for risk evaluation
    domain: Domain where action will be taken

Returns risk tier and assessment details.

validate_action.description:
Validate if a proposed action is permissible under current policies.

Args:
    action: The action to validate
    agent: Agent proposing the action
    override_reason: Reason for override if bypassing policy

Returns validation result.

governance_validate.description:
Validate a proposed action against governance rules and risk tiers.

Args:
    action: Action description
    risk_tier: Proposed risk tier classification
    domain: Affected domain

Returns governance validation with required approvals.

check_policy.description:
Check if an action meets the policy requirements for a domain.

Args:
    action: The action to check
    domain: Domain whose policies apply
    include_exceptions: Whether to show policy exception list

Returns policy compliance status.

action_check.description:
Check whether an action is allowed under current authorization policies.

Args:
    action_type: Type of action
    target: Target resource or system
    agent_id: Agent requesting permission

Returns allow/deny decision.

system_status.description:
Get current system status including component health and resource usage.

Args:
    components: List of components to check
    include_metrics: Whether to include performance metrics

Returns system status summary.

get_overview.description:
Get a high-level overview of the system state and active work.

Args:
    domains: Domains to include in overview
    include_recent: Whether to include recent activity

Returns a system overview.

check_health.description:
Check system health and connectivity of all components.

Args:
    deep: Whether to perform a deep health check
    components: Specific components to check

Returns health status for each component.

system_info.description:
Get information about the system configuration and running state.

Args:
    section: Configuration section to retrieve
    verbose: Whether to include detailed information

Returns system information.

get_context.description:
Get the current context and state of the system.

Args:
    context_type: Type of context ('session', 'domain', 'agent')
    agent_id: Agent to get context for

Returns current context state.

status_check.description:
Check the status of various system processes and connections.

Args:
    target: Specific target to check status for
    verbose: Whether to return detailed status

Returns status information.

org_search.description:
Search for organizations in the federation registry.

Args:
    query: Organization name or attribute to search for
    org_type: Type of organization to filter by
    active_only: Only return active organizations

Returns matching organizations.

list_capabilities.description:
List available capabilities registered in the federation.

Args:
    org_id: Optional organization to scope capabilities
    capability_type: Type of capability to list
    available_only: Only show currently available capabilities

Returns capability list.

federation_query.description:
Query the federation registry for organizations and capabilities.

Args:
    query: Search query
    registry_type: Type of registry ('org', 'capability', 'contract')
    limit: Max results

Returns matching registry entries.

contract_history.description:
Get the history of federation contract events and settlements.

Args:
    org_id: Organization to get contract history for
    contract_type: Type of contract
    since: Start date for history

Returns contract event history.

send_notification.description:
Send a notification to a channel or person.

Args:
    message: The notification message
    channel: Target channel or recipient
    priority: Notification priority ('low', 'normal', 'high', 'urgent')

Returns send confirmation.

post_message.description:
Post a message to a communication channel.

Args:
    message: Message content
    channel: Target channel identifier
    thread_id: Optional thread to reply to

Returns message ID and timestamp.

get_calendar_availability.description:
Get calendar availability for scheduling a meeting.

Args:
    attendees: List of attendees to check availability for
    duration_minutes: Meeting duration in minutes
    date_range: Date range to search within

Returns available time slots.

schedule_meeting.description:
Schedule a meeting by finding an available slot and creating the event.

Args:
    title: Meeting title
    attendees: List of attendees
    duration_minutes: Duration in minutes
    preferred_times: Preferred time windows

Returns the created meeting event.

get_domain_status.description:
Get the current status of a specific domain including open work and alerts.

Args:
    domain: Domain identifier
    include_resolved: Whether to include recently resolved items

Returns domain status summary.

list_domain_items.description:
List all active items within a specific domain.

Args:
    domain: The domain to list items for
    item_types: Types of items to include
    sort: Sort field

Returns items in the domain.

get_work_queue.description:
Get the current work queue of pending actions and tasks.

Args:
    agent: Agent whose queue to retrieve
    priority_min: Minimum priority threshold
    domain: Optional domain scope

Returns the work queue.

query_decisions.description:
Query past decisions by keyword, domain, or decision maker.

Args:
    query: Text search in decision records
    domain: Domain to scope decisions
    decided_by: Agent or person who made the decision
    since: Only decisions after this date

Returns matching decisions.

search_work_history.description:
Search the work history for completed tasks and past activity.

Args:
    query: Text search query
    domain: Domain filter
    date_from: Start date
    date_to: End date

Returns matching work history entries.

get_error_summary.description:
Get a summary of recent errors and their resolutions.

Args:
    component: Component to get errors for
    hours: Look-back window in hours
    include_resolved: Whether to include resolved errors

Returns error summary.
